exclusion_method.description: Read canonical records and relationEndpointShapeIssue directly, then excluded relation records associated with applied relation cleanup batches017-033 and missing-target repairs without mutating canonical data.
exclusion_method.retired_submission_filter: retired.json entries whose reason/source_decision matched batch017 through batch033 or missing/target repair

recommendation.summary: Clean up three relations that use part_of_program with a project subject and an event object. The event targets are either accidental substitutes for real program/project records or meeting/work-plan context, not legal program containers.
recommendation.why_not_validator_rule_change: part_of_program currently expects project|route -> project|entity, which matches the ontology idea of membership in a program, parent project, or program-owning entity. Allowing event objects would make meetings, openings, and agenda dates behave like program containers. The three examples show target-selection errors: two cited blocks name a real parent project, and one cited block only schedules a project topic for a committee meeting.
proposed_mechanism: Retire the three malformed part_of_program project->event rows.

For relation_gcm-east-side-access, replace with part_of_program project_grand-central-madison -> project_annual-2021-east-side-access if a cleanup pass accepts the existing East Side Access project target.
For relation_westbury-garage-main-line-expansion, replace with part_of_program project_lirr-westbury-parking-garage -> project_lirr-main-line-expansion-jan2023.

For relation_gcsip-part-of-grade-xing-improvement-program, replace with has_timeline_event project_meeting-doc-115236-grade-crossing-safety -> event_safety-committee-meeting-july2022, or related_to project->event if the cleanup pass wants a weaker meeting-agenda association. Include adjacent block meeting_doc_91576#p006_c0016 because the existing cited block only says July 2022.

representative_records.display_name: Grand Central Madison - part of East Side Access
representative_records.evidence_command_output: raw_text: Contract VM014 provides engineering and fabrication for elevators and escalators for the East Side Access project; MTA C&D requests Board approval for maintenance at the new Grand Central Madison Terminal.

candidate_replacement.why: The cited block names East Side Access as the parent project context; the current event object is only the board meeting source context.

representative_records.display_name: Grade Crossing Improvement Projects under Safety Committee Work Plan
representative_records.evidence_command_output: p006_c0015 raw_text: July 2022; adjacent p006_c0016 raw_text: - Homeless Outreach Program Update - Grade Crossing Enhancement Projects; p006_c0017 raw_text: MTA Chief Safety & Security MTA Office of Safety Management.

candidate_replacement.why: The evidence supports committee-agenda/timeline context, not program membership in a meeting event.

representative_records.display_name: Westbury Garage - Part of LIRR Main Line Expansion

object.display_name: Westbury Parking Garage Expected Opening March 2021

representative_records.evidence_command_output: p033_c0007 raw_text: As part of LIRR's Main Line Expansion project, a 667 space parking garage was constructed on the north side of the Westbury station.

candidate_replacement.why: The cited block explicitly names LIRR's Main Line Expansion project as the parent project; the current event object is the garage opening timing, not the program.

relation_shape_probe: part_of_program project->event: Relation kind part_of_program expects project|route -> project|entity, got project -> event.

commands_run: rg --files data/review_notes data/submissions data/submission-overrides | sort | rg 'relation.*(033)|batch033|missing.*target|target_repair|repair'
bun --eval '<readCanonicalRecords plus relationEndpointShapeIssue inventory excluding retired/prepared batches017-033 and missing-target repair ids>'
bun --eval '<canonical record inspection for the three part_of_program project->event rows and endpoints>'
bun --eval '<canonical project search for East Side Access, Grand Central Madison, Main Line Expansion, Westbury, Grade Crossing, and Safety Committee Work Plan>'
bun --eval '<canonical project-only search for east-side-access, esa, main-line-expansion, grade-crossing-safety>'
